name: IEEE Transactions on Engineering Management

length.basis: double-spaced single-column initial submission; 42 pages for review articles
length.note: Final formatted equivalent <=15 printed pages (research); overlength charge $200 per additional printed page.

abstract.note: On the first page. Must not contain concepts or conclusions beyond those in the paper.

keywords.note: Index terms not stated on the society guidelines page; IEEE generally expects them via the Author Center.

formatting.note: Double-spaced, 12pt, single-column, 1-inch margins. Page size not specified.

figures_tables.note: Refer to all illustrations in text; captions on a separate caption list; professional quality.

cover_letter.note: Not specified; one corresponding author designated.

ai_disclosure.note: IEEE has a publisher-wide AI policy via the IEEE Author Center; not restated on this page.

distinctive_rules: Mandatory 150-200 word Managerial Relevance Statement on the first page.
Overlength page charges ($200/printed page over the limit).
References ordered by citation order, not alphabetized.
Explanatory footnotes numbered separately at the bottom of their page; funding as a footnote.
Papers that only describe technical tools/algorithms are out of scope.
